subject: fix(print): improve print output quality — hide interactive UI, fix empty sections, add print-only heading
body:
Addresses remaining print output issues found during second-pass review:

1. ComparisonManager wrapped in no-print — purely interactive UI (checkboxes,
   rename, delete, import/export) is noise in a PDF
2. Collapsed sections (Transfer Pricing, Advanced Analysis) now conditionally
   hidden via class:no-print when collapsed — prevents empty card shells from
   appearing when toggle buttons are hidden by print CSS
3. Expanded sections preserve heading text via print-include class on toggle
   buttons; chevron SVGs hidden in print since they reference interactive state
4. Added .print-only utility class (hidden on screen, visible in print) and
   .print-include class (keeps specific buttons visible in print)
5. Pricing page: model selector tabs hidden in print, replaced with print-only
   heading showing selected model name and icon for context
6. docs/README.md updated to list PDF alongside JSON/CSV export

Tags: print, css, ux, cleanup, pdf
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-download
Semver: patch

title: improve print output quality — hide interactive UI, fix empty sections, add print-only heading
